scripts.models:optimize: npm run models:optimize:chhatak && npm run models:optimize:boat
scripts.models:optimize:chhatak: gltf-transform optimize public/models/chhatak.glb public/models/chhatak.glb --compress meshopt --texture-compress webp
scripts.models:optimize:boat: gltf-transform optimize public/models/boat.glb public/models/boat.glb --compress meshopt --texture-compress webp
